title: Filtering Issue in A Dashboard
excerpt: I setup a dashboard to view all active milestones across various boards and noticed that some of the milestones are not showing up. I’ve checked the advanced filtering setup and it is the same as other boards that are di…

posts.author: aesnarski (Annie)
posts.cookedHtml: I setup a dashboard to view all active milestones across various boards and noticed that some of the milestones are not showing up. I’ve checked the advanced filtering setup and it is the same as other boards that are displaying. I’m wondering if anyone else has had this issue and how that can be fixed?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! I’d love to take a look at this with you! Could you post a couple of screenshots of what you’re seeing so we can better understand the issue? It would be super helpful to see your Dashboard widget settings and where the milestones are missing. Thanks!
